description: Skill target board: fetches the next departures for a specific stop/direction from the BVG transport.rest API, takes the first departure's 'when' timestamp and returns the minutes until it leaves as a speakable sentence, e.g. { "text": "The next bus leaves in 7 minutes." } — or a fallback sentence when no departure is found in the window. Change the stop, direction, or time window via the Fetcher's url state. Used by the Voice Assistant + Skills board; the outer board's text-to-speech announces the result. Save this board locally as 'next bus' so the dispatcher can find it by name.

template.text=: params.next ? 'The bus leaves in ' + moment(params.next.when).diff(moment(), 'minutes') + ' minutes at ' + moment(params.next.when).format('HH:mm') + '.' : 'I found no upcoming departures.'
